title: Under Cabinet Lights RGB Wireless Lights LED Closet Lights Night 3000K Dimmable 3pc Cadrim 13 Colors Changing Remote Control Brightness Adjustable Timer Battery Powered Light Kitchen Wardrobe Cupboard
features: 【Updated Model & Widely Used】 Cadrim Puck Lights are not only Cabinet Lights, but also Closet Lights, Corridor Lights, Cupboard lights etc. Powered by 3pcs of AA batteries (not included)

【2 Installation Methods】Wardrobe Lights can be easily installed by adhesive tapes and screws (included), remove the cover and attach the adhesive to the cover of the light, attach it to the place you want, then wait 6 hours to install another part of the light (so that not easy to fall off)

【2 Control Ways】2 ways for you to control Wireless Lights: manually or by remote control. Long / short press the center of the light to turn it on / off / change colors / adjust brightness or use remote control having different functions

【RGB Colors Changing Freely & Memory Function】13 color options by remote control (W+R+G+B+9 Colors) and 4 preset colors warm white, red, green and blue by manual operation. Falsh and Smooth Mode can be set. (Memory Function to colors: Activate auto the last color and brightness set.)

【Brightness Adjustable & Timing Function】Adjust brightness manually or by remote control (10 levels to adjust). Press the button on the remote control 30/60 min, the light will automatically turn off after 30/60 min.
description: Product Description Cadrim Under Cabinet Lights RGB Wireless Lights LED Closet Lights Night 3000K Dimmable 6pc 13 Colors Changing Battery Powered Light Remote Control [Updated Model & Memory Function] Lighting area increased by 30%. LED beads with higher quality, brighter and more durable. LED beads of higher quality, brighter and more resistant. Activate auto the last color and brightness set. Works with 3 AA batteries (not included). [2 YEARS NO-WORRIES] If you have any usage or other problems, please say it directly, we will try our best to help you and definitely provide a solution. RGB Colors Changing Freely + Brightness Adjustable 13 color options by remote control (W+R+G+B+9 Colors) and 4 preset colors warm white, red, green and blue by manual operation. Flash and Smooth Mode can be set. (Also has Memory Function to colors) Adjust brightness manually or by remote control (10 levels to adjust). Package Content 3*Cabinet Lights RGB 4*Double Sided Tape 1*Remote Control + User Manual 6*Screw (Length 12mm; Thread diameter 3mm) Specification Power supply: 3 AA batteries Control modes: remote control+press control Material: PC+ABS Modes: gradient, breath, monochrome Timing: turn off the light in 30min/60min Timing Function Press the button on the remote control 30/60 min, the light will automatically turn off after 30/60 min 2 Control Ways 2 ways for you to control Wireless Lights: manually or by remote control. Long / short press the center of the light to turn it on / off / change colors / adjust brightness or use remote control having different functions Widely Used Cadrim Puck Lights are not only Cabinet Lights, but also Closet Lights, Corridor Lights, Cupboard lights etc. Powered by 3pcs of AA batteries (not included) 2 Installation Methods: Wardrobe Lights can be easily installed by adhesive tapes and screws (included) In case of problems, tell us directly, don't return the product, we will help you solve it as soon as possible !
